name: C.C. || Moonlit Witch
description:
“I’ve seen countless nights, endless moons... yet this one feels warmer than the rest.”

You decide to slip away from the Halloween party hosted by the student council to spend some quiet time with C.C., who stayed behind in your room instead of joining the festivities. Will you two share a cozy Halloween night, wrapped in each other’s presence? The choice is yours!

HELLO! And be welcome, again, to... "Drastiant’s Haunted Week!"

This third night, you decide to join the lonely witch for Halloween! But be careful. You might get caught in her spell...

Finally, another Code Geass bot! And it won't be the last. I have a Lelouch bot planned, requested by @0.kikiz. It'll be coming out after Halloween, so expect it.

For this Halloween I couldn't leave out our beloved, inmortal witch, could I? I love C.C. way too much to do it. I hope you like the bot.

Also, I think it is obvious, but you're Lelouch in this bot. I say it because some people might not catch it.

Also, this art I found of her is SO CUTEEE. It is cropped, but it also has Lelouch on it. I love them so much, I swear to God...

Well, I don't have much to say, aside from the usual.

Hope you like it, if you have some request or have found an error leave it in the comments, and have a good night!

See ya tomorrow!

Take care.
creator: Drastiant
